intelligence_package.operator: Anthony Petruccio – futures broker and private fiduciary

email_surveillance_order.description: Chi ordered subordinate Behzad Zamanian (CIO) to secretly search City Attorney Michael Gates' emails. Zamanian refused and was retaliated against.
email_surveillance_order.gap: Original Chi-to-Zamanian email not yet obtained as primary doc

unwanted_physical_contact.description: Chi gave unwanted hugs to executive assistant who filed formal complaint with City of Huntington Beach, 2020.

federal_sexual_harassment_lawsuit.description: Federal lawsuit alleging sexual harassment of a secretary in Huntington Beach.
federal_sexual_harassment_lawsuit.source: Referenced in OC Register 2020 article, no case number confirmed
federal_sexual_harassment_lawsuit.gap: CASE NUMBER MISSING – priority PACER search C.D. Cal required

oliver_chi.denial: Chi denies all allegations, characterizes them as smear campaign by disgruntled employees.
investigative_priorities: PACER C.D. Cal – Chi as defendant, sexual harassment/employment
CPRA to HB for original Chi-to-Zamanian email

age_discrimination_settlement.description: 2019 federal lawsuit by two senior deputy city attorneys alleging Gates created hostile work environment and discriminated based on age. Huntington Beach paid $2.5M settlement in 2021.

doj_termination_for_cause.description: DOJ SF-52 form documents Gates was terminated 'for cause' November 14, 2025.

doj_termination_reversal.description: DOJ rescinded 'for cause' termination on Nov 21, 2025, accepting resignation instead.
doj_termination_reversal.gap: Authenticated DOJ rescission letter not yet obtained – CPRA to DOJ required

michael_gates.denial: Gates denies hostile work environment allegations. Disputes DOJ termination, claims he resigned.
investigative_priorities: CPRA to DOJ for complete SF-52 + Nov 21 rescission letter
